old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-cqce","title":"EDHOC signing key not zeroized in EdhocInitiator/EdhocResponder","description":"File: rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs
Lines: 177-193, 599-614

The EdhocInitiator and EdhocResponder structs contain SigningKey (Ed25519 private key):
```rust
pub struct EdhocInitiator {
    /// Our Ed25519 signing key.
    signing_key: SigningKey,
    ...
}
```

The state structs (InitiatorState, ResponderState) derive Zeroize/ZeroizeOnDrop, but the outer structs (EdhocInitiator, EdhocResponder) do NOT.

The SigningKey from ed25519-dalek does implement Zeroize, but without #[zeroize(drop)] on the outer struct, dropping an EdhocInitiator/EdhocResponder won't zeroize the signing_key.

Impact: Ed25519 signing key may remain in memory after EDHOC completion.

Fix: Add #[derive(Zeroize)] and #[zeroize(drop)] to EdhocInitiator and EdhocResponder:
```rust
#[derive(Zeroize)]
#[zeroize(drop)]
pub struct EdhocInitiator {
    signing_key: SigningKey,
    ...
}
```","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:38:57.413023Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:38:57.413063Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-cqce","title":"EDHOC signing key not zeroized in EdhocInitiator/EdhocResponder","description":"File: rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs
Lines: 177-193, 599-614

The EdhocInitiator and EdhocResponder structs contain SigningKey (Ed25519 private key):
```rust
pub struct EdhocInitiator {
    /// Our Ed25519 signing key.
    signing_key: SigningKey,
    ...
}
```

The state structs (InitiatorState, ResponderState) derive Zeroize/ZeroizeOnDrop, but the outer structs (EdhocInitiator, EdhocResponder) do NOT.

The SigningKey from ed25519-dalek does implement Zeroize, but without #[zeroize(drop)] on the outer struct, dropping an EdhocInitiator/EdhocResponder won't zeroize the signing_key.

Impact: Ed25519 signing key may remain in memory after EDHOC completion.

Fix: Add #[derive(Zeroize)] and #[zeroize(drop)] to EdhocInitiator and EdhocResponder:
```rust
#[derive(Zeroize)]
#[zeroize(drop)]
pub struct EdhocInitiator {
    signing_key: SigningKey,
    ...
}
```","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:38:57.413023Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T20:17:19.955555761Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T20:17:19.955555761Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T20:22:19.955555761Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T20:17:19.955555761Z"}
new_value: {"notes":"Commit: d501b7a25\nEdhocInitiator/Responder already #[derive(Zeroize, ZeroizeOnDrop)] with #[zeroize(skip)] on signing_key (which implements ZeroizeOnDrop). Comment explains. Key zeroized on drop. P2 fixed."}
ZeroizeOnDrop derive + skip already present on structs; commit d501b7a25
